prompt:
Hi, I have some tips that can help you to solve your difficulties in studing in university.

I want to start with one important thought: it`s okay to have some difficulties in the beggining of your studing. Everything around is new and you will need a time to feel free here. 

So the first thing I can recommend is making friends. It will take some time from you, but it`s worth it. Friends will help you with studying and it is more interesting to get fun together. To have a rest is also a very important part of studing, don`t forget about it.

The second thing is time manegement. Often university has many subjects to study, a lot of home tasks and plenty of other interesting activities. If you don`t want to know absolutely everything about every subject, I`ll recommend you to refuse from going on some lecturies and activities. But you need to be accurate with it. It`s easy to start getting bad marks, so you need to decide what lecturies you will be visiting and what tasks will be doind.

I hope me suggestions will help you, good luck and good bye.

TASK: You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.
STUDENT_TEXT: Hi, I have some tips that can help you to solve your difficulties in studing in university.

I want to start with one important thought: it`s okay to have some difficulties in the beggining of your studing. Everything around is new and you will need a time to feel free here. 

So the first thing I can recommend is making friends. It will take some time from you, but it`s worth it. Friends will help you with studying and it is more interesting to get fun together. To have a rest is also a very important part of studing, don`t forget about it.

The second thing is time manegement. Often university has many subjects to study, a lot of home tasks and plenty of other interesting activities. If you don`t want to know absolutely everything about every subject, I`ll recommend you to refuse from going on some lecturies and activities. But you need to be accurate with it. It`s easy to start getting bad marks, so you need to decide what lecturies you will be visiting and what tasks will be doind.

I hope me suggestions will help you, good luck and good bye.

Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, I know some people who have the simular problem. So, let me try to give you few tips about solving it.

Firstly, the most important thing is time managment. You need to understand when you sleep, eat, go for a walk, etc.

Then, I think it's very nice to solve problems when they was given for you. Don't put them closely to deadlines. If you don't do it, you will have to make many tasks in one-two days. It's surely not good.

My final tip is about eating healthy food. Yes, this tip is really obvios, but without it you probably will have a lot of health difficulties.

So, I hope my tips will help you to get more free time! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hello, friend!

You don't need to worry about studying at university so bad. You can easily become better at organizing your time. Let me give you a few tips how to do that right.

1. You should think about making day schedules. It may be very useful to think about organizing your next day routine every evening. You'll feel more in control of your actions and choices. 

2. Don't forget to move all the time. You can do some special sports or just basic physical excersices. It is very important for your health and well-being. It'll reduce your stress level as well, so you'll feel more confident at making decisions.

3. Sleep well. It's neccessary to have a good rest after a day of hard work. Try to sleep at least 8 hours each day. You'll be able to do your tasks more productively this way, so you'll have more free time as well.

As you see, these tips aren't complicated at all. I hope they'll help you to become better at your studying routine.
